g.text: Good morning mesh! Mountain relay checking in.
Harbor monitor online. Winds 12kt NW, vis good.
Thanks for the report. Anyone seeing traffic on the
Confirmed, light traffic downtown. All clear here.
Park ranger here. Trail conditions are good today.
Mobile unit 7 heading to marina, will relay from there.
Nice! Perfect weather for mesh testing.
Agreed. Let's do a range test this afternoon.
Hilltop solar here. Battery at 92%, good signal.
Just saw a cargo ship pass under the bridge. Cool view!
Anyone up for a group hike next weekend? 🏔️
Count me in! Let's plan on the Saturday morning.
I can relay from Twin Peaks if you need coverage.
At marina now. Signal is 3 hops to mountain relay.
